extended_help:
Cast your line and catch fish to sell or cook.

**Mechanics:**
• Cooldown: 20 seconds
• Cost: {{cost}} stamina per cast
• Equip a fishing rod in /inventory for +rare chance

**Uses:**
1. **Sell** — /sell for instant coins
2. **Cook** — /cook to make meals (+HP and buffs)

**Rarity Rates:**
⚪ Common 50% • 🟢 Uncommon 28% • 🔵 Rare 14% • 🟣 Epic 6% • 🟡 Legendary 2%

Tip: Save Rare+ fish for cooking before /hunt or /dungeon. Check all rates with /droprate type:fish
author: {{username}} is fishing
footer: Equip a fishing rod in /inventory for better catches!
